payload.description: Latino's & Friends launched a job shadowing initiative supported by their Executive Sponsors Lisette Camillo and Demetrius Crichlow, providing employees with a window into career options in the workplace.

ERG Leadership Training centered on developing strong leaders, covering leadership skills for being a responsive leader, alignment of mission/vision/purpose with MTA Strategic Priorities, and tools to measure ERG success.

payload.event_name: Employee Resource Group All Member Meeting Workshop
payload.description: Continued Personal Best: New Year, New You theme for 2023 focused on Emotional Intelligence (E.I.), covering The Importance of Emotional Intelligence and best practices for elevating E.I. Allows nine ERGs to network, collaborate, connect, and share.

payload.claim_text: MTA LIRR conducted a utilization analysis of females and minorities in its workforce. The utilization analysis consists of comparing MTA LIRR's June 30, 2023, workforce percentages for females and minorities to the estimated availability of the females and minorities available within the relevant labor market.
payload.description: MTA LIRR conducted a utilization analysis comparing workforce percentages to availability in the relevant labor market.

payload.claim_text: MTA LIRR's action strategy to address areas of underutilization: Forecast Future Opportunities, Identify specific job titles within underutilized EEO categories, Meet with the People Department to gather historical data and determine windows of opportunities for future hiring, Departmental Engagement, Meet with Department Heads to discuss specific areas of underutilization, Create customized strategies for job titles identified, Focus on Underutilized Categories. Predominate areas of underutilization for females is in the Administrative Support and Skilled Craft categories. Ticket Clerk, Customer Service Ambassador and Machinist job titles were identified as areas of greatest opportunities during 2024 recruitment. Underutilization for minority males was found in the Officials & Administrator category. Management job titles were identified as areas of greatest opportunities. During the next 6 months, relevant stakeholders will meet to develop a plan specifically focused on the job titles within the underutilized categories.
payload.description: MTA LIRR action strategy to address underutilization areas

tool_args.label: D&I in Motion - ERG focus on Revive Talent and Culture

payload.claim_text: This quarter we focused on the MTA Strategic Priority 'Revive Talent and Culture' with a particular focus on retention.
payload.description: Employee Resource Groups focused on the MTA Strategic Priority Revive Talent and Culture
